name: Laval Blaster
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned, if you have a "Laval" monster in your Graveyard other than "Laval Blaster": You can choose a number from 1 to 5, then send that many cards from the top of your Deck to the Graveyard; this card gains 200 ATK for each "Laval" monster sent to the Graveyard to activate this effect.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned, if you have a "Laval" monster in your Graveyard other than "Laval Blaster": You can choose a number from 1 to 5, then send that many cards from the top of your Deck to the Graveyard; this card gains 200 ATK for each "Laval" monster sent to the Graveyard to activate this effect.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned, if you have a "Laval" monster in your Graveyard other than "Laval Blaster": You can choose a number from 1 to 5, then send that many cards from the top of your Deck to the Graveyard; this card gains 200 ATK for each "Laval" monster sent to the Graveyard to activate this effect.

jp_sets.set: Duel Terminal Chronicle 1 - Chapter of Awakening

action: Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard for cost
